source.caption: Épure E 61 (b) : rabattement du triangle ABC sur le plan vertical, charnière oblique ch^V, A étant sur la charnière.

notes: Left half of the fig02 sheet (E61 b + c share it). Ground line straightened to y=385.5 — same scan-skew reasoning as fig01a; the recall lines are pixel-vertical.

The hinge is a frontale of the plane lying IN πV (its H trace coincides with the LT, labeled π^H ch^H — hence no aH/bH pair, depth 0). B^H sits ABOVE the LT: B is behind πV, the plane crosses πV along the hinge.
A is on the hinge; the drawn A^V_R coincides with A^V.
